title: CustomMetadataRequest
description: Schema for CustomMetadataRequest in Nuix REST API

fieldName.description: The name of the custom metadata field

value.description: The value of the custom metadata field

type.description: The data type of the field

params.description: Any parameters required to parse the value field.  params must contain a key "mimeType" with value being the MIME type of the binary data being stored. The value must be a valid MIME type name known to Nuix.
